title: fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.2.3
body:

| [github.com/opencontainers/runc](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc) | `v1.2.2` -> `v1.2.3` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2frunc/v1.2.3?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2frunc/v1.2.3?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2frunc/v1.2.2/v1.2.3?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fopencontainers%2frunc/v1.2.2/v1.2.3?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>opencontainers/runc (github.com/opencontainers/runc)</summary>

### [`v1.2.3`](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/releases/tag/v1.2.3): runc v1.2.3 -- "Winter is not a season, it's a celebration."

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/compare/v1.2.2...v1.2.3)

This is the third patch release of the 1.2.z release branch of runc. It
primarily fixes some minor regressions introduced in 1.2.0.

-   Fixed a regression in use of securejoin.MkdirAll, where multiple
    runc processes racing to create the same mountpoint in a shared rootfs
    would result in spurious EEXIST errors. In particular, this regression
    caused issues with BuildKit. ([#​4543](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4543), [#​4550](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4550))
-   Fixed a regression in eBPF support for pre-5.6 kernels after upgrading
    Cilium's eBPF library version to 0.16 in runc. ([#​3008](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/3008), [#​4551](https://redirect.github.com/opencontainers/runc/issues/4551))

##### Static Linking Notices

The `runc` binary distributed with this release are *statically linked* with
the following [GNU LGPL-2.1][lgpl-2.1] licensed libraries, with `runc` acting
as a "work that uses the Library":

[lgpl-2.1]: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/old-licenses/lgpl-2.1.en.html

-   [libseccomp](https://redirect.github.com/seccomp/libseccomp)

The versions of these libraries were not modified from their upstream versions,
but in order to comply with the LGPL-2.1 (§6(a)), we have attached the
complete source code for those libraries which (when combined with the attached
runc source code) may be used to exercise your rights under the LGPL-2.1.

However we strongly suggest that you make use of your distribution's packages
or download them from the authoritative upstream sources, especially since
these libraries are related to the security of your containers.

<hr>

Thanks to all of the contributors who made this release possible:

-   Aleksa Sarai <cyphar@cyphar.com>
-   Kir Kolyshkin <kolyshkin@gmail.com>
-   lifubang <lifubang@acmcoder.com>

Signed-off-by: Aleksa Sarai <cyphar@cyphar.com>

</details>
